name: Strawberry Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 9 inch baked pastry shell or Graham cracker crust
1 14 oz. can Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed milk
1 quart Fresh strawberries, cleaned and hulled
1 16 oz. package prepared strawberry glaze -- chilled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
2. Gradually beat in the sweetened condensed milk until smooth.
3. Stir in the Realemon lemon juice and vanilla extract.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pastry shell or Graham cracker crust.
5. Chill for 3 hours or until set.
6. Top with strawberries and desired amount of glaze.
7. Refrigerate any leftovers.
